model = Sketchup.active_model
model.start_operation('AWARE add circle', true)
center = Geom::Point3d.new(0, 0, 0)
normal = Geom::Vector3d.new(0, 0, 1)
edges = model.entities.add_circle(center, normal, 500.mm)
model.commit_operation
{ 'edge_count' => edges.length, 'first_id' => edges.first.persistent_id.to_s }
